discrepancies.summary: Q-212-2 and Q-212-4 are operationally coupled: the transparency-disclosure language from Q-212-4 delta-mitigation belongs inside the Mazzocco email being drafted under Q-212-2 delta. Not a contradiction; flagged as REFINED per cascade-123 §3.2; both LOCKs stand independently. Operational consequence: when Q-212-2 substrate work fires, it MUST include a one-sentence section referencing Garoufalidis as the standing math.NT primary track.
discrepancies.resolution: Cross-question coupling encoded as todo_dep edge: q-212-2-mazzocco-draft DEPENDS_ON nothing but todo description explicitly references Q-212-4 transparency language as a section requirement.
